name: Scottie Swingle School Buses
districts_or_customers: Wayne County / Lake Ariel area PA school districts (likely Western Wayne / Wallenpaupack Area)
recent_news: Long-tenured (est. 1983) very small family contractor; no recent M&A/news identified. Third-party listings show ~2 employees and very small revenue, consistent with a single-route owner-operator.
fit_notes: Single owner-operator (a few buses) in NE PA; ~40+ years tenure suggests succession opportunity, but scale is far below typical Summit tuck-in threshold. Possibly route/asset acquisition only.

name: Florida International Sch-Bus
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint located. Listed address (6138 SW 194th Ave) is a residential address in Southwest Ranches/Fort Lauderdale FL; no website, no phone in source record, no SunBiz filings surfaced under this exact name.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as an active operating contractor. Likely a very small/inactive single-route operator or possibly an inaccurate directory entry. Not actionable as a tuck-in without further offline diligence (SunBiz, school-district contract list).

name: Us Bus LLC
recent_news: Listed address (2705 Burris Rd, Davie FL) is a shared transportation/truck-stop complex (Florida 595 Truck Stop) also occupied by FloridaTours.com (charter), Davie Travel Center, and other logistics LLCs. No standalone web footprint as an active school-bus contractor under 'US Bus LLC'.
fit_notes: Likely a charter/shuttle operator sharing the Florida 595 transit complex rather than a true school-district contractor. Cannot confirm independent school-bus operations; not actionable without SunBiz/permit verification.

name: Helena West Helena Trnsprtn
owner_or_parent: Helena-West Helena School District (in-house) / Durham School Services contract per source record
districts_or_customers: Helena-West Helena School District (Phillips County, AR)
recent_news: Listing is the school district's transportation department, headed by Director Jerry Burks; source website field 'Durhamschoolservices.com' indicates Durham School Services (National Express / Summit platform) involvement. This is the Summit platform / a district department, NOT an independent target.
fit_notes: EXCLUDE - this is a school-district transportation department (and/or already served by Durham/National Express, which is the Summit platform). Not an independent private operator and not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Gulfstream Auto Bus
recent_news: FMCSA/USDOT 1061392, MC 480175 shows just 1 truck and 1 driver, interstate passenger authority; USDOT status reported inactive. Address 8601 S Ocean Dr, Jensen Beach is a residential condominium on Hutchinson Island, not a bus yard. Active since Oct 2002 per DOT records.
fit_notes: EXCLUDE - 1-vehicle/1-driver charter passenger carrier with inactive USDOT, registered at a beachfront condo. Not a school-bus contractor and not viable as a Summit tuck-in.
